title: andrographis lineata
intro: Andrographis lineata, also known as the king of bitters, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of India and Southeast Asia. It is a member of the family Acanthaceae, with medicinal properties attributed to its bitter compounds, including andrographolide, which has anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Andrographis lineata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as the common cold and flu. Andrographis lineata is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and tinctures, which are often consumed to support immune function and overall well-being.
